creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
Now following patch should be applied.

diff -aurN ../../tmp/wmakerconf/Makefile ./Makefile
--- ../../tmp/wmakerconf/Makefile	Sun Aug  2 00:49:10 1998
+++ ./Makefile	Tue Feb  9 21:26:26 1999
@@ -1,23 +1,22 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for: wmakerconf
-# Version required:    0.6
+# Version required:    1.5
 # Date created:        1 Aug 1998
 # Whom:                rom
 #
 # $Id$
 #
 
-DISTNAME=  	wmakerconf-0.6
-CATEGORIES=     x11
+DISTNAME=  	wmakerconf-1.6
+CATEGORIES=     x11 windowmaker
 MASTER_SITES=   http://www-info2.informatik.uni-wuerzburg.de/staff/ulli/wmakerconf/ \
 		ftp://sunshine.informatik.uni-wuerzburg.de/pub/wmaker/
 
 MAINTAINER=	rom_glsa@ein-hashofet.co.il
 
-LIB_DEPENDS+=   gtk\\.1\\.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11/gtk \
-		Imlib\\.1\\.7:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/imlib
+LIB_DEPENDS=	gtk.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk10
 
-USE_X11=        yes
-USE_PERL5=	yes
+USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
+USE_PERL5=	YES
 GNU_CONFIGURE=  yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -aurN ../../tmp/wmakerconf/files/md5 ./files/md5
--- ../../tmp/wmakerconf/files/md5	Sun Aug  2 00:13:10 1998
+++ ./files/md5	Sun Feb  7 22:36:02 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (wmakerconf-0.6.tar.gz) = f5a82856844e6236f9952f26a447b7b9
+MD5 (wmakerconf-1.6.tar.gz) = a8adb0448ab5e1f68e2873753b62aed0
diff -aurN ../../tmp/wmakerconf/patches/patch-aa ./patches/patch-aa
--- ../../tmp/wmakerconf/patches/patch-aa	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
+++ ./patches/patch-aa	Sun Feb  7 22:36:02 1999
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+--- Makefile.in~	Thu Jan 21 07:32:38 1999
++++ Makefile.in	Sun Feb  7 21:26:35 1999
+@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@
+ 
+ bin_PROGRAMS		= wmakerconf
+ wmakerconf_LDADD	= $(top_srcdir)/GTKstep/libgtkstep.a \
+-			  $(GDK_IMLIB_LIBS)
++			  $(GDK_IMLIB_LIBS) $(GTK_LIBS)
+ wmakerconf_SOURCES	= dialog.c error.c icons.c keys.c menu.c misc.c \
+ 			  previews.c rootmenu.c shortcuts.c texture.c \
+ 			  tileofday.c window.c wmconfig.c gtkfontsel.c
+@@ -104,7 +104,7 @@
+ 			  README.GTKstep MANUAL wmakerconf.spec wmakerconf.xpm \
+ 			  black.xpm
+ 
+-INCLUDES		= @INCLUDES@ $(GDK_IMLIB_CFLAGS)
++INCLUDES		= @INCLUDES@ $(GDK_IMLIB_CFLAGS) $(GTK_CFLAGS)
+ ACLOCAL_M4 = $(top_srcdir)/aclocal.m4
+ mkinstalldirs = $(SHELL) $(top_srcdir)/mkinstalldirs
+ CONFIG_HEADER = config.h
diff -aurN ../../tmp/wmakerconf/pkg/PLIST ./pkg/PLIST
--- ../../tmp/wmakerconf/pkg/PLIST	Sun Aug  2 00:58:00 1998
+++ ./pkg/PLIST	Sun Feb  7 22:36:03 1999
@@ -1,14 +1,31 @@
 bin/wmakerconf
-@cwd /usr/X11R6/share
-wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf
-wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.de
-wmakerconf/upgrade.pl
-wmakerconf/gettile.pl
-wmakerconf/libwww.pl
-wmakerconf/lynx.pl
-wmakerconf/wmakerconf.gtkrc
-wmakerconf/themes.org.jpg
-wmakerconf/README
-wmakerconf/COPYING
-wmakerconf/wmaker-version
-@dirrm wmakerconf
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.ct
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.de
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.es
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.fr
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.fi
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.gr
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.it
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.tr
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.pt
+share/wmakerconf/wmaker-version
+share/wmakerconf/NLS-TEAM
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.ca
+share/wmakerconf/WMWmakerconf.el
+share/wmakerconf/wm-oldmenu2new.sh
+share/wmakerconf/upgrade.pl
+share/wmakerconf/gettile.pl
+share/wmakerconf/libwww.pl
+share/wmakerconf/lynx.pl
+share/wmakerconf/themes.org.jpg
+share/wmakerconf/t.o.mini.xpm
+share/wmakerconf/README
+share/wmakerconf/README.GTKstep
+share/wmakerconf/COPYING
+share/wmakerconf/MANUAL
+share/wmakerconf/wmakerconf.xpm
+share/wmakerconf/black.xpm
+@unexec if [ -d  %B/GTKstep/gtk ]; then rmdir %B/GTKstep/gtk; fi
+@unexec if [ -d  %B/GTKstep ]; then rmdir %B/GTKstep; fi
+@dirrm share/wmakerconf

---
KIRIYAMA Kazuhiko <kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp>
